name: io.github.jascal/orca-mcp-server
title: Orca MCP Server
description: Go from natural language to verified finite state machines — topology bugs caught before code runs.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key for LLM-powered tools (generate_machine, generate_multi_machine, refine_machine, generate_actions with use_llm). Not required for parse_machine, verify_machine, compile_machine, or server_status.

environmentVariables.name: ORCA_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: LLM provider to use: anthropic (default), openai, grok, or ollama.

environmentVariables.name: ORCA_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Model name to use for LLM tools. Defaults to claude-sonnet-4-6 for Anthropic.
